sourcesContent:
export default function SpaceCard({ space, onToggleFavorite, isFavorite, commuteMins }) { return (
{space.rating}

{space.name}

{space.locationText}
₹{space.pricePerDay}
/day
{typeof commuteMins === 'number' && (
~ {commuteMins} min commute
)}
{space.amenities.slice(0, 3).map((a) => ( {a} ))} {space.amenities.length > 3 && ( +{space.amenities.length - 3} )}
{onToggleFavorite && ( )}
); }
